title: Imagine Waking Up Tomorrow and All Music Has Disappeared
original_title: Imagine Waking Up Tomorrow and All Music Has Disappeared
overview: Imagine waking up tomorrow and all music has disappeared. Just like that. What will remain when it is all gone: CDs, iPods, instruments?
